overview.description: Demonstration of positive test for Dynamo DB
overview.name: Positive DynamoDB Test

http.comment: Check ability to get empty list of news

migrate.comment: Check ability to migrate test dataset
migrate.name: DYNAMO

http.comment: Check ability to get new records with http query

dynamo.comment: Check ability to get new records with SELECT query
Check ability to make INSERT query into the DB

http.comment: Check ability to get new records with http query

dynamo.comment: Check ability to get new records with SELECT query

http.comment: Check ability to add a news into the DB

var.comment: Creating variable for id of previous news
var.name: newsId

dynamo.comment: Check ability to get previous record with SELECT query

http.comment: Check ability to get news by id

dynamo.comment: Check ability to get 'name' where 'active' is false
dynamo.query: SELECT name FROM dynamodb_news WHERE active = false

var.comment: Creating variable with name from previous query
var.name: newsName

dynamo.comment: Check ability to delete record from DB
dynamo.query: DELETE FROM dynamodb_news WHERE name = '{{newsName}}' AND id = '3'

dynamo.comment: Checking that previous record was deleted
dynamo.query: SELECT * FROM dynamodb_news WHERE name = '{{newsName}}' AND id = '3'

http.comment: Checking that previous record was deleted

dynamo.comment: Check ability to update record in the DB
dynamo.query: UPDATE dynamodb_news SET name = 'HotNews4' WHERE id = '4'

dynamo.comment: Checking that previous record was updated
dynamo.query: SELECT name FROM dynamodb_news WHERE id = '4'

http.comment: Checking that previous record was updated
